narrative: Middle East escalation drives geopolitical risk premium as U.S. and Iranian forces exchange fire — gold lower -0.13% near $4,528; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.33%; VIX 18.3. USD/JPY firms to 157.24 as +300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand; EUR/USD retreats to 1.1693 on 175bp Fed-ECB advantage. Watch RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC for immediate AUD/USD direction.
